name: Laka's Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup peanuts, shelled, toasted and ground
recipeInstructions:
MEATBALLS:
1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Check salt level.
3. Cook in oil.
SAUCE:
1. Blend orange juice and cornstarch until smooth.
2. Stir mixture into boiling beef stock along with ginger, season with salt and pepper.
3. Stir over heat until it thickens slightly.
4. Serve sauce over meatballs.
